title: Particl Gets Listed on HitBTC

tags.name: Exchanges
tags.description: All articles related to exchanges, coin swaps, and listings.

plaintext:
Particl is excited to announce that PART has been listed on the Hong Kong-based
exchange HitBTC as of the 21st of October 2019. HitBTC becomes the highest
volume exchange on which PART is traded and exposes the project to a wider
audience.

This HitBTC listing is a first and quite significant step towards making the
Particl platform and its Open Marketplace accessible to more people. For one, it
provides an additional gateway on which you can acquire PART to use the Open
Marketplace. Additionally, HitBTC doesn’t require users to provide KYC
information for up to 1 Bitcoin worth of withdrawals a day and 5 Bitcoin a
month.

You can also fund your HitBTC account with various cryptocurrencies or by
sending USD or EUR via multiple deposit/withdrawal methods (wire transfers,
SEPA).

To start buying and selling PART on HitBTC, follow this link: 
https://hitbtc.com/exchange/PART-to-BTC

Particl PART to Bitcoin BTC Exchange / HitBTC
[https://hitbtc.com/exchange/PART-to-BTC]
Dear traders holding ERC20 ICX tokens on your HitBTC accounts, we kindly inform
you that HitBTC supports the ICX token…
[https://hitbtc.com/exchange/PART-to-BTC]hitbtc.com
[https://hitbtc.com/exchange/PART-to-BTC]


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

> HitBTC, founded in 2013 by experienced system architects and technology experts,
is one of the oldest and fastest growing crypto exchanges in existence. With an
unparalleled track record of reliability, we offer our clients a comprehensive
range of services that are accented by our smooth order execution,
state-of-the-art trading terminal, and unmatched liquidity. Our exchange is the
largest spot trading market in the industry with over 800 trading pairs and 500+
spot instruments supported, including Bitcoin, Ethereum, EOS, Litecoin, Tron
and others.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
html:
Particl is excited to announce that PART has been listed on the Hong Kong-based exchange HitBTC as of the 21st of October 2019. HitBTC becomes the highest volume exchange on which PART is traded and exposes the project to a wider audience.

This HitBTC listing is a first and quite significant step towards making the Particl platform and its Open Marketplace accessible to more people. For one, it provides an additional gateway on which you can acquire PART to use the Open Marketplace. Additionally, HitBTC doesn’t require users to provide KYC information for up to 1 Bitcoin worth of withdrawals a day and 5 Bitcoin a month.

You can also fund your HitBTC account with various cryptocurrencies or by sending USD or EUR via multiple deposit/withdrawal methods (wire transfers, SEPA).

To start buying and selling PART on HitBTC, follow this link: https://hitbtc.com/exchange/PART-to-BTC

Particl PART to Bitcoin BTC Exchange / HitBTC
Dear traders holding ERC20 ICX tokens on your HitBTC accounts, we kindly inform you that HitBTC supports the ICX token…hitbtc.com

HitBTC, founded in 2013 by experienced system architects and technology experts, is one of the oldest and fastest growing crypto exchanges in existence. With an unparalleled track record of reliability, we offer our clients a comprehensive range of services that are accented by our smooth order execution, state-of-the-art trading terminal, and unmatched liquidity. Our exchange is the largest spot trading market in the industry with over 800 trading pairs and 500+ spot instruments supported, including Bitcoin, Ethereum, EOS, Litecoin, Tron and others.
